It's about 70° in Zhilinda, a town in this Russian region... oh wait, that's 70° north latitude. I meant it hit -80 in 2023

categories.name: WHAT IS THAT TEAM NAME CREATURE?

There's a fruit in the name of this slimy fellow that represents UC Santa Cruz

final.clue: The 2 states that border the most others, they border each other along a roughly 60-mile stretch between Kentucky & Arkansas
